creator: alexander.puecker@hetzner.com
text:
Created attachment 215953
SVN Patch

The attached Ports Tree patch would update the ftp/proftpd port to the current version 1.3.6d which was released at the 30.05.2020: http://proftpd.org/docs/NEWS-1.3.6d

As far as I have tested it Proftpd 1.3.6d do work correct on FreeBSD 11. I have not tested it with FreeBSD 12.
